---
title: "Modeling (Threshold Analysis)"
author: "Group 6"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# setup chunks
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, fig.align = "center", warning = F, message = F)
# load libaries
library(tidyverse)
library(grid)
library(patchwork)
library(gridExtra)
# load helper scripts; ROOT tells the header this notebook knits one level
# below the repo root
ROOT <- ".."
source(file = file.path(ROOT, "R/header.R"))
```

```{r}
# Create vector of thresholds to be analyzed
threshold_vec <- data.frame(threshold = seq(-2,2,by=0.05))
```

```{r}
# Run a new stack (F reads the committed data-gen/ copies instead)
run_stack <- F

# Create corrosponding stack of couldabeens under variable threshold
if(run_stack){
  stack <- create_threshold_stack(ls_datasets, threshold_vec, payroll_c)
  write.csv(stack, file.path(ROOT, "data-gen/stack.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
} else{
    stack <- read_csv(file.path(ROOT, "data-gen/stack.csv"))
}
```

```{r}
if(run_stack){
  # Coefficients in a threshold stack
  coef_array <- coefs_by_stack(stack, threshold_vec)
  write.csv(coef_array, file.path(ROOT, "data-gen/coef_array.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
} else{
  coef_array <- read_csv(file.path(ROOT, "data-gen/coef_array.csv"))
}
```

```{r, fig.align = "center"}
# Split arrays
coef_arrayYR <- coef_array[which(coef_array$model == "year"),]
coef_arrayLB <- coef_array %>% anti_join(coef_arrayYR)
# Plot the coefficients against the varying thresholds
coef_plotYR <- ggplot(data = coef_arrayYR) +
  geom_smooth(mapping = aes(x = threshold, y = coef), se = F) +
  geom_point(mapping = aes(x = threshold, y = coef))
coef_plotLB <- ggplot(data = coef_arrayLB) +
  geom_smooth(mapping = aes(x = threshold, y = coef), se = F) +
  geom_point(mapping = aes(x = threshold, y = coef))
```

```{r}
# Coefficient sensitivity to the classification threshold: year model, then
# labor-share model
coef_plotYR
coef_plotLB
```
